name: radial-timeline
description: Map your manuscript across four modes — Progress, Narrative, Chronologue, and Gossamer — plus the Inquiry View for higher-level story analysis. Visualize scenes, subplots, structure, chronology, and story shape in one connected workspace.

scripts.dev: node scripts/check-social-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-inquiry-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-modal-settings-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-timeline-chrome-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && node esbuild.config.mjs
scripts.build-only: node show-scripts.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-social-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-inquiry-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-modal-settings-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-timeline-chrome-ert-lock.mjs --quiet && npx tsc --noEmit && node code-quality-check.mjs src/main.ts src/styles/settings.css --quiet && node check-css-duplicates.mjs --quiet && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node check-css-duplicates.mjs --quiet
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.gates:legacy: node scripts/check-model-updates.mjs --quiet && node scripts/check-api-features.mjs --summary && node scripts/validate-pricing.mjs && node check-css-duplicates.mjs --quiet && npm run build-only && node code-quality-check.mjs --all && npm run css-drift -- --maintenance && node scripts/compliance-check.mjs --maintenance && npm run audit:spec-coverage && npm test
scripts.verify:publish: npm run publish:pdf-smoke && npm run publish:pdf-assembly && npm run publish:pdf-visual
scripts.audit:tsc-unused: mkdir -p docs/audits && tsc -p tsconfig.audit.json --noEmit > docs/audits/tsc-unused.txt 2>&1 || true
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:sanitation && npm run audit:tsc-unused && npm run audit:eslint
scripts.audit:codebase:
node -e "console.log('Weekly Codebase Health Audit
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/weekly-codebase-health-audit.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/codebase-health-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-codebase-health.md

This script does not run the audit automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root.')"
scripts.audit:architecture:
node -e "console.log('Weekly Architecture Drift Audit
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/weekly-architecture-drift-audit.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/architecture-drift-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-architecture-drift.md

This script does not run the audit automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root.')"
scripts.audit:obsidian:
node -e "console.log('Biweekly Obsidian Ecosystem Audit
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/biweekly-obsidian-ecosystem-audit.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/obsidian-ecosystem-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-obsidian-ecosystem.md

This script does not run the audit automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root.')"
scripts.audit:refactor-board:
node -e "console.log('Monthly Refactor Recommendation Board
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/monthly-refactor-board.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/refactor-board-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-refactor-board.md

This script does not run the board automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root. The agent will synthesize the prior month of reports under docs/engineering/audits/reports/.')"

author: Eric Rhys Taylor
